Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and seasonal inventory highlights from the website.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual catalog lookups.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email—subject line, body copy, CTAs, and product highlights—tailored to the R1 Concepts brand voice.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work each week.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the target contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email distribution pipeline so campaigns go out consistently every day without manual scheduling or list management.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, featured collections, and promotional offers from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Guarantees emails reflect real-time inventory and promotions, keeping messaging accurate and reducing content errors.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email with subject line, persuasive body copy, and product-specific calls to action for DFC audiences.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, brand-consistent email creative every day, eliminating the bottleneck of manual copywriting and design iteration.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email in HubSpot, maps it to the appropriate DFC contact list, and dispatches it through the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures daily DFC campaigns are sent on schedule to segmented audiences without any manual intervention in HubSpot.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, order history, and ticket descriptions.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests so no ticket is missed, giving the AI full context to classify and respond accurately.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (returns, shipping, fitment, warranty) and drafts a context-aware reply using R1 Concepts support guidelines.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time dramatically by pre-drafting replies, allowing support agents to review and send instead of writing from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, attaches the draft reply as a note, and adjusts ticket priority if escalation is recommended.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot so agents see classifications and ready-to-send drafts without switching tools.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions stored as contacts or form entries in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Captures every customer-reported issue from Amazon packaging inserts in one query, ensuring no return reason or complaint is overlooked.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Writes the extracted issue data into a structured Google Sheet with categorized columns for team analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, filterable dashboard of customer issues, enabling fast identification of recurring defects or fulfillment problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals on the R1 website, such as page views, product clicks, and repeat visits.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Identifies high-intent DFC customers browsing R1 products in real time, enabling the sales team to act on warm leads before interest fades.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channels and email with customer details and activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Ensures sales reps are instantly notified of active prospects, reducing lead response time and increasing the chance of closing deals while interest is high.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Provides a customer-facing AI chat interface on the R1 Concepts website to answer product questions, check order status, and guide purchases.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Offers 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and support ticket volume while improving the online shopping experience.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Processes customer queries using AI and backend integrations (in development) to deliver accurate answers, product recommendations, and order details.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will deflect routine support inquiries and drive conversions by guiding customers to the right brake parts without human intervention.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creator candidates that wouldn't appear through platform-only searches.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, content topics, and recent post data from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with quantitative metrics so the team can evaluate reach and relevance before any outreach begins.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates discovered creator data, ranks creators by keyword relevance and audience fit, and outputs a structured discovery list.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw search and social data into an actionable shortlist of high-potential creators, saving hours of manual research per campaign.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria including engagement rate, audience size, content relevance, brand safety, and niche authority.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective manual vetting with a consistent, data-driven scoring system that ensures only the best-fit creators move to outreach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a qualification summary for each creator with strengths, risks, and a recommended partnership tier based on the scoring output.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives the partnerships team a clear, defensible rationale for each creator selection, streamlining internal approval and budget allocation.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, brand guidelines, and prompt instructions stored in Google Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards without requiring the team to manually attach resources each time.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and brand messaging guidelines.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized, on-brand outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic template blasts.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators via Gmail and logs sent messages for tracking and follow-up scheduling.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the sending and tracking of all outreach emails, ensuring timely delivery and enabling systematic follow-up without manual effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads including previous outreach and negotiation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides full conversational context so the AI can craft informed, continuity-aware replies.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's response, applies learned negotiation patterns from previous influencer email contacts, and drafts a contextually appropriate reply.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles routine negotiation exchanges automatically, maintaining a professional and strategic tone that accelerates deal closure without constant human drafting.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted response via Gmail and logs the full conversation and negotiation status to Google Drive for team visibility.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps the entire creator negotiation pipeline moving while building a searchable knowledge base of negotiation outcomes for future AI learning.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying items.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability data, ensuring every qualifying part is captured without human error.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Generates a formatted DFC load sheet and accompanying sales sheet from the matched data, ready for distribution.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Produces print-ready and email-ready documents in seconds instead of the 30+ minutes of manual formatting previously required each week.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the weekly Must Have Monday email in HubSpot with the generated sales sheet and load sheet attached.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Ensures the MHM email goes out on schedule every Monday with accurate, up-to-date attachments, driving consistent dealer engagement.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the designated Teams channel with a summary of the load sheet and email send status.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team informed in real time, enabling quick review and immediate visibility into weekly campaign execution.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email content in minutes, freeing the marketing team from repetitive copywriting for every new product drop.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates First to Market email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, sales sheets, and proper segmentation for new product launches and monthly recaps.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers ready-to-review email drafts directly in HubSpot, drastically reducing campaign setup time and ensuring consistent formatting across all product launches.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Aggregates CRM performance data automatically, eliminating manual report pulls and ensuring accuracy in executive-facing presentations.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls website traffic, organic search performance, keyword rankings from GA4 and Search Console, and SMS campaign metrics from Attentive.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Centralizes multi-channel marketing data from four platforms into a single pipeline, saving significant time on monthly data gathering.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with the collected metrics, charts, and formatted reporting data.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most tedious portion of the monthly marketing deck, delivering presentation-ready slides without any manual data entry or formatting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current keyword rankings and identifies keyword gaps where competitors rank but R1 Concepts does not.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-value keyword opportunities with real search data, ensuring every blog post targets a genuine traffic gap rather than guessing at topics.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured with proper headings, internal links, and on-page SEO elements.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready long-form content at scale, enabling consistent blog output without burdening the marketing team with manual writing.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog content to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization including meta tags, slug, and readability checks.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Delivers fully optimized, live blog posts without manual CMS work, accelerating time-to-publish and maintaining SEO best practices on every article.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes vendor purchase order exports from Dream ERP, extracting PO details including vendor info, line items, quantities, and expected delivery dates.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual data extraction from ERP exports, ensuring every outstanding PO is captured and no vendor follow-ups are missed.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating deal records and triggering automated vendor chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the entire vendor follow-up workflow, ensuring timely chase emails go out for every overdue PO and freeing the purchasing team from manual outreach.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number data and the New Availability Guide as inputs via a browser-based interface, then matches parts against available inventory.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Provides an instant, self-service matching tool that anyone on the team can use without technical setup, enabling on-demand load sheet generation.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Generates and exports a fully formatted DFC load sheet as an Excel file with matched parts, pricing, and vehicle details ready for distribution.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces clean, formatted Excel load sheets in seconds, removing all manual spreadsheet formatting and ensuring consistent output every time.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive via Chrome browser automation, locates the previous week's MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as a starting template.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Saves significant time by reusing proven campaign structure and formatting, ensuring brand consistency across every weekly SMS blast.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the new vehicle name, adjusts the scheduled send time, and finalizes the campaign for delivery.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Delivers a fully configured weekly MHM SMS campaign without any manual Attentive UI work, eliminating repetitive clicks and reducing the risk of scheduling errors.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts and analyzes Dream sales data including order history, customer purchase patterns, product performance, and revenue trends.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Transforms raw ERP sales data into actionable customer intelligence, enabling data-driven segmentation and campaign targeting that would take hours to compile manually.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Creates customer segmentation dashboards and triggers automated email campaigns including reorder reminders, cross-sell recommendations, and win-back sequences.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue through perfectly timed, personalized outreach—reorder reminders catch customers before they lapse, and cross-sell campaigns increase average order value.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to segmented customer lists for time-sensitive promotions, reorder nudges, and win-back messages.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-open-rate SMS channel to the automated outreach mix, reaching customers who may not engage with email and driving faster response rates.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors the designated Microsoft Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the weekly Super Session Saturday content.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates the need for manual file tracking and handoff coordination, ensuring the automation triggers as soon as the source file is available.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download link for inclusion in the email.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures the download link is always current and hosted reliably, preventing broken links and providing trackable file access for every recipient.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-time weekly email every Saturday without any manual HubSpot work, maintaining reliable dealer engagement with zero team effort.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting automotive shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-relevant topics and keyword optimization.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Scales DFC's B2B content production without additional writing resources, producing targeted articles that speak directly to professional buyer search intent.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog content to the DFC WordPress site with proper SEO formatting, categories, and tags for the B2B audience.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a consistent publishing cadence that builds organic search authority over time, driving qualified B2B traffic from shops, fleets, and distributors.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Pulls the latest Friction Friday video URL, title, description, and transcript each week.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual content sourcing and ensures every weekly video is captured automatically without missed uploads.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Auto-generates and publishes a blog post with embedded video, optimized copy, and SEO metadata.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Saves 30-60 minutes of manual blog creation per week and ensures every video has a corresponding SEO-indexed page driving organic traffic.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends a branded weekly email to the Friction Friday subscriber list featuring the new video and blog link.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Drives consistent weekly engagement with subscribers and increases video views and blog traffic without any manual email builds.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Fires an SMS to opted-in customers with the video link and posts a Teams notification to the internal team confirming the workflow completed.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Reaches customers on mobile for higher immediate engagement rates while keeping the team informed of successful sends without manual check-ins.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Scans all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows to identify inactive, redundant, or misconfigured automations including site visit triggers and welcome series.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Surfaces broken or underperforming workflows that may be losing leads or sending incorrect messaging, providing a clear optimization roadmap.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Reconfigures site visit triggers, refines welcome series logic, removes duplicates, and updates enrollment criteria for cleaner automation paths.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Improves lead nurture conversion rates and ensures new contacts receive timely, relevant communications without falling through gaps in the funnel.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs, account details, purchase history flags, and contact information from the ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a single source of truth for customer identity that connects offline ERP records to digital marketing workflows.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps and syncs each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record, creating custom properties for sales automation workflows.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Enables DFC sales team to trigger personalized automations based on ERP purchase data, closing the gap between offline transactions and digital outreach.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping project requirements, defining data sources, and mapping the intended automation architecture for the Bomb file workflow.
Bomb File Project.impact: Establishes a clear project blueprint before development begins, preventing scope creep and ensuring alignment across stakeholders.

Image Mapping Project for Dream.action: Auditing existing product image references within Dream ERP and planning an automated mapping schema to link images to SKUs and catalog entries.
Image Mapping Project for Dream.impact: Lays groundwork for automated image-to-product association, which will eliminate hours of manual image tagging and reduce catalog errors.

Claudia Automation.action: Defining the automation scope, triggers, and integration points for the Claudia workflow during the planning phase.
Claudia Automation.impact: Ensures the final automation is well-architected and addresses the right pain points before any development resources are committed.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Mapping the current Shirly invoice PDF generation process and identifying automation triggers, templates, and delivery methods.
Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.impact: Creates a clear automation plan that will eliminate manual PDF creation and distribution, reducing invoicing time and human error.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects and pulls the latest R1 Concepts weekly YouTube video including title, URL, transcript, and thumbnail.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Ensures no weekly video is missed and all downstream content channels are fed automatically from a single upload event.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Generates an SEO-optimized blog post with embedded video, written summary, and metadata tailored to R1 Concepts' audience.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Converts every video into an indexable blog asset that drives organic search traffic and extends the content's shelf life beyond YouTube.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a weekly branded email to the R1 subscriber list featuring the new video, blog link, and relevant CTAs.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Drives consistent subscriber engagement and funnels traffic to both the blog and YouTube channel without manual email production each week.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends an SMS notification to opted-in R1 customers and posts a completion alert to the internal Microsoft Teams channel.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Captures immediate mobile attention for higher engagement while giving the team real-time visibility into successful weekly sends.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly SEO performance data including impressions, clicks, average position, organic sessions, and page-level traffic for DFC blog posts.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a complete picture of how AI-generated blog content is performing in search, enabling data-driven decisions on content strategy.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects blog post metadata, publish frequency, Yoast SEO scores, and content health indicators across all DFC blog agent posts.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Tracks content production efficiency and quality scores to ensure the blog agent is consistently publishing optimized, high-quality posts.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Compiles all data into a weekly reporting dashboard showing traffic trends, ranking improvements, agent efficiency, and business impact metrics.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives stakeholders a single-view weekly snapshot proving ROI of the AI blog agent and highlighting opportunities for further optimization.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the past week's performance metrics from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, CPA, and ROAS.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Aggregates cross-platform ad data in one place, saving 1-2 hours of manual data pulling and eliminating the risk of missed anomalies.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares this week's metrics against the previous month's averages, identifies significant deviations, and generates a plain-English performance summary with callouts.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw numbers into actionable insights instantly, flagging underperforming campaigns and highlighting wins so the team can act without manual analysis.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the team via email with per-channel breakdowns and highlighted variances.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures every stakeholder receives a consistent, automated performance briefing every week without anyone having to build or send the report manually.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Pulls end-of-month performance data from Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, and ROAS.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Eliminates hours of manual data extraction across three separate ad platforms, ensuring all metrics are captured consistently and without human error.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Analyzes the aggregated ad performance data and formats it into a structured monthly report layout designed for end-of-month presentation slides.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Transforms raw multi-platform data into a polished, slide-ready narrative with key takeaways, saving the team from manually building and formatting the report each month.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Delivers the formatted monthly report via email to the relevant stakeholders for review and inclusion in end-of-month slides.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Stakeholders receive a ready-to-present report in their inbox without needing to request it, keeping the monthly review cycle on track and consistent.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Identifies customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration form and exports their contact information.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Automatically captures high-intent warranty registrants without manual list pulls, ensuring no qualified customer is missed for retargeting.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Processes and formats the customer data to match Meta's custom audience upload requirements, validating and standardizing fields.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Ensures clean, properly formatted audience data so Meta can achieve the highest possible match rate, maximizing retargeting reach.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Uploads the formatted customer list into a Meta custom audience for retargeting and lookalike audience creation.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Warranty registrants are automatically added to paid social audiences, enabling ongoing retargeting and lookalike expansion without any manual CSV uploads.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Extracts ad-level performance data and creative copy from Meta and TikTok, focusing on underperforming ads by CTR, conversion rate, and engagement metrics.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the specific ads dragging down account performance without requiring manual review of every campaign across both platforms.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Audits the underperforming ad copy, identifies weaknesses such as unclear CTAs or low-engagement hooks, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Provides actionable, copy-level improvement suggestions that would otherwise require a dedicated creative strategist to review each ad individually.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy improvements to the paid social team for review and implementation.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: The team receives a prioritized punch list of copy fixes ready to act on, accelerating the optimization cycle from days to hours.

Asana Agent.action: Pulls task data including due dates, assignees, statuses, and overdue items from relevant Asana projects and workspaces.
Asana Agent.impact: Automatically aggregates project status across teams without anyone needing to manually check boards or generate Asana reports.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes the task data into a clear status update, highlighting overdue items, upcoming deadlines, and blockers.
Asana Agent.impact: Transforms raw task lists into a digestible summary that keeps stakeholders informed without requiring them to log into Asana.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the formatted project status summary to relevant team members via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Stakeholders receive proactive project updates in their inbox, reducing the need for status check-in meetings and keeping accountability visible.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media-related Teams meetings, extracting discussion points and decisions.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures nothing discussed in media meetings is lost or forgotten, eliminating reliance on manual note-taking during fast-paced calls.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the raw meeting notes and any supplementary context via email to the processing pipeline.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable handoff of meeting content into the automation workflow, ensuring all context is preserved for task extraction.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Analyzes the meeting content to identify action items, assign owners, set deadlines, and format them as structured tasks.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Automatically converts meeting discussions into clearly defined tasks with owners and due dates, removing the bottleneck of someone manually writing up follow-ups.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in Asana with the extracted action items, assignees, due dates, and relevant meeting context.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Meeting follow-ups are instantly tracked in Asana with full accountability, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks between discussion and execution.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Extracts search ad performance data and copy details, focusing on ads with low quality scores, poor CTR, or underperforming conversion rates.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Automatically identifies the weakest search ads across campaigns without requiring manual review of every ad group and keyword combination.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Audits the underperforming search ad copy, diagnoses issues like weak headlines or misaligned keyword intent, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers expert-level copy analysis and improvement suggestions that can boost quality scores and CTR, replacing time-intensive manual ad copy reviews.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends the search ad audit report with flagged underperformers and recommended copy updates to the search team for implementation.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: The search team receives a ready-to-implement optimization plan, compressing what would be a multi-hour audit into an automated deliverable.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the Agent Tracker spreadsheet containing agent statuses, performance data, and update logs.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Pulls the latest agent tracking data automatically, removing the need to manually scan the spreadsheet for changes each week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw spreadsheet data into a clean, easy-to-read weekly summary highlighting key changes, progress, and any agents needing attention.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Converts a dense spreadsheet into a scannable weekly digest, making it easy for stakeholders to stay informed without parsing rows of data.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Delivers the formatted weekly agent tracker update to stakeholders via email.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Team leads receive a consistent, readable weekly update in their inbox, ensuring visibility into agent operations without any manual effort.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Receives the vehicle spec (make, model, year) from Mark's HubSpot form submission and queries the DFC product catalog for matching parts.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly searches the full catalog against the submitted vehicle spec, replacing hours of manual inventory lookup across multiple systems.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Cross-references the catalog results with live inventory data to identify what DFC currently stocks versus what is missing from inventory for the specified vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a complete stock-vs-gap picture in seconds, enabling Mark to immediately see opportunity areas without manual inventory checks.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the matched and missing parts data into a structured Excel-ready layout with clear columns for stocked items and inventory gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Automates the formatting and organization of catalog data into a professional deliverable, eliminating manual spreadsheet assembly.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends the formatted Excel file to Mark showing DFC's stocked parts and missing inventory for the submitted vehicle spec.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a complete, presentation-ready catalog file in his inbox minutes after submitting the form, turning a multi-hour manual process into an automated delivery.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit shipments for all parts on the weekly backorder report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Centralizes real-time inventory lookups that previously required a dozen people doing independent searches across multiple systems.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the weekly backorder report with the live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no available source, and structures the output for review.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable intelligence report, instantly surfacing which orders can be fulfilled and which are truly stuck.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates and delivers the enriched report to the internal team.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customers receive proactive status updates and the team gets a single enriched report, replacing fragmented manual outreach and eliminating duplicate lookup work across the organization.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automatically aggregates competitor and supplier catalog data that would take days to manually research and compile from three separate sources.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and gaps in coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC already competes and where market opportunities exist, providing Dino with a clear competitive landscape without manual comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Runs automated customer outreach campaigns to gather demand data on two-piece rotor applications and collect interest signals.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand directly from customers before inventory decisions are made, reducing the risk of stocking parts with insufficient demand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive reference document that combines supplier data, competitive analysis, and demand signals — giving Dino everything needed to make stocking decisions in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active ad campaigns and extracts every copy field including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and call-to-action text from both Meta and TikTok accounts.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual ad auditing across multiple platforms, ensuring no active ad is overlooked during compliance or brand-consistency reviews.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every extracted ad copy field against a defined list of flagged phrases, identifying exact matches and recording the specific field, ad name, and surrounding copy context for each violation.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers instant, accurate phrase detection across hundreds of ads simultaneously, catching prohibited language or outdated messaging that manual reviews would likely miss.

Meta Investigation.action: Compiles all flagged results into a structured email report listing each matched phrase, the ad it appeared in, the specific copy field, and the full text, then sends it to the designated recipients.
Meta Investigation.impact: Stakeholders receive a clear, actionable report in their inbox immediately, enabling fast remediation of non-compliant or problematic ad copy without logging into any ad platform.
